README.markdown:2:[![Linux build](https://travis-ci.org/stp/stp.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/stp/stp)
README.markdown:3:[![Windows build](https://ci.appveyor.com/api/projects/status/35983b7cnrg37whk?svg=true)](https://ci.appveyor.com/project/msoos/stp)
README.markdown:18:## Build and install
README.markdown:20:For a quick install:
README.markdown:23:sudo apt-get install cmake bison flex libboost-all-dev python perl minisat
README.markdown:26:mkdir build
README.markdown:27:cd build
README.markdown:28:cmake ..
README.markdown:29:make
README.markdown:30:sudo make install
README.markdown:77:## Detailed Building and Installation
README.markdown:79:STP is built with [CMake](https://cmake.org/), version 3.0.2 or newer. CMake is a
README.markdown:80:meta build system that generates build files for other tools such as
README.markdown:81:make(1), Visual Studio, Xcode, etc.
README.markdown:87:- ``CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE`` - The build type (e.g. Release)
README.markdown:88:- ``CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX`` - The prefix for install (e.g. /usr/local )
README.markdown:91:- ``ENABLE_PYTHON_INTERFACE`` - Enable building the Python interface
README.markdown:92:- ``PYTHON_EXECUTABLE`` - Set python executable in case you have more than one python installed
README.markdown:94:- ``STATICCOMPILE`` - Build static libraries and binaries instead of dynamic
README.markdown:97:STP relies on : boost, flex, bison and minisat. You can install these by:
README.markdown:100:$ sudo apt-get install cmake bison flex libboost-all-dev python perl minisat
README.markdown:103:STP uses minisat as its SAT solver by default but it also supports other SAT solvers including CryptoMiniSat as an optional extra. If instal
led, it will be detected during the cmake and used:
README.markdown:108:$ mkdir build && cd build
README.markdown:109:$ cmake ..
README.markdown:110:$ make
README.markdown:111:$ sudo make install
README.markdown:115:### Building a static library and binary
README.markdown:118:$ mkdir build && cd build
README.markdown:119:$ cmake -DSTATICCOMPILE=ON ..
README.markdown:120:$ make
README.markdown:121:$ sudo make install
README.markdown:125:### Configuration and build options
README.markdown:127:To tweak the build configuration:
README.markdown:129:* Run ``cmake-gui /path/to/stp/source/root`` instead of ``cmake``. This
README.markdown:131:  variables and lets you pick the build system generator.
README.markdown:133:* Run ``ccmake`` instead of ``cmake``. This provides an ncurses terminal
README.markdown:136:* Pass ``-D<VARIABLE>=<VALUE>`` options to ``cmake`` (not very user friendly).
README.markdown:137:  It is probably best if you **only** configure this way if you are writing
README.markdown:140:You can also tweak configuration later by running `make edit_cache` and edit any configuration variables, reconfigure and then regenerate th
e build system. After configuration, build by running `make`.
README.markdown:142:You can use the `-j<n>` flag to significantly to decrease build time by running `<n>` jobs in parallel (e.g. `make -j4`).
README.markdown:149:pip install lit
README.markdown:150:mkdir build
README.markdown:151:cd build
README.markdown:152:cmake -DENABLE_TESTING=ON ..
README.markdown:153:make
README.markdown:154:make check
README.markdown:157:### Installing
README.markdown:159:To install run `make install` and to uninstall run `make uninstall`. The root of installation is controlled by the `CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX` va
riable at configure time. You can change this by running `make edit_cache` and editing the value of `CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX`.
README.markdown:162:### Building on Visual Studio
README.markdown:165:git installed. Get zlib:
README.markdown:172:mkdir build
README.markdown:173:mkdir myinstall
README.markdown:174:cd build
README.markdown:175:cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="..\myinstall" ..
README.markdown:176:cmake --build .
README.markdown:177:cmake --build . --target install
README.markdown:186:mkdir build
README.markdown:187:mkdir myinstall
README.markdown:188:cd build
README.markdown:189:cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="..\myinstall" -DZLIB_ROOT="..\..\zlib\myinstall" ..
README.markdown:190:cmake --build .
README.markdown:191:cmake --build . --target install
README.markdown:201:Finally, Build STP:
README.markdown:207:mkdir build
README.markdown:208:cd build
README.markdown:209:cmake -DBoost_USE_STATIC_LIBS=ON -DENABLE_TESTING=ON -DPYTHON_EXECUTABLE="C:\Program Files\Python36\\python.exe" -DLIT_TOOL="C:\Program File
s\Python36\Scripts\\lit.exe" -DMINISAT_LIBDIR="..\..\minisat\myinstall\lib" -DMINISAT_INCLUDE_DIRS="..\..\minisat\myinstall\include" -DZLIB_ROOT="..\..\zlib\myi
nstall" -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH="C:\cygwin64" ..
README.markdown:210:cmake --build .
README.markdown:211:cmake --build . --target install
README.markdown:214:### Building Docker
README.markdown:219:docker build -t stp .
